[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A simple cartoon-style face with pink cheeks and an open-eye expression fills the frame.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a white, rounded cartoon head with a small nose, closed curved eyebrows, half-closed eyes represented by short dark lines, pink circular cheeks on both sides, and a frown-like open mouth with a curved, shaded line shape near the bottom; the head has short, rounded arms or side protrusions.

Setting:
The background is solid black, with no visible environment or time-of-day cues.

Visual Details:
The image is a close-up, centered composition viewed straight-on, showing only the head and minimal body/arms. The character outline is dark gray to black, with soft shading in the facial features and uniform flat white fill. The pink cheeks are bright and circular, contrasting with the white face and dark outline. Lighting appears flat and evenly distributed, typical of a graphic illustration.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a minimalist cartoon face with closed-eye lines, pink cheeks, and a curved mouth. It is displayed against a solid black background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
Gambar ini menampilkan ilustrasi kartun seekor kucing putih yang menggemaskan. Kucing ini memiliki mata tertutup, pipi merah muda, dan garis-garis abu-abu di kepalanya. Lengannya disilangkan di depan dada, memberikan kesan tenang atau mungkin sedikit merajuk. Keseluruhan gambar ini bernuansa imut dan tidak mengandung konten NSFW.
